{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [], "credits_detailed": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-33167", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": [], "cwes": [], "description": "### Impact
The debug exceptions page does not properly escape exception messages. A carefully crafted exception message could inject arbitrary HTML and JavaScript into the page, leading to XSS. This affects applications with detailed exception pages enabled (`config.consider_all_requests_local = true`), which is the default in development.

### Releases
The fixed releases are available at the normal locations.

### Credit
This issue was responsibly reported by Hackerone researcher [fbettag](https://hackerone.com/fbettag).", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pgm4-439c-5jp6", "html_url": "https://github.com/rails/rails/security/advisories/GHSA-pgm4-439c-5jp6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pgm4-439c-5jp6"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-33167"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-03-23T20:04:36Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/131752?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jhawthorn/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jhawthorn/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jhawthorn/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jhawthorn/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/jhawthorn", "id": 131752, "login": "jhawthorn", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjEzMTc1Mg==", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jhawthorn/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jhawthorn/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jhawthorn/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jhawthorn/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/jhawthorn/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/jhawthorn", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "low", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "Possible XSS vulnerability in Action Pack debug exceptions", "updated_at": "2026-04-21T19:23:29Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/rails/rails/security-advisories/GHSA-pgm4-439c-5jp6", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "rubygems", "name": "actionpack"}, "patched_versions": "8.1.2.1", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 8.1, < 8.1.2.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
